cards.name: Solomon's Diary
cards.text:
Solomon's Diary cannot use the Attack Action or Reinforce.
If you control "Solomon, the Dragon" it gains +3 Power.

Support Action: Mill 3, draw a card and return Target card from your Graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Solomon, the Dragon
cards.text:
Frontline only. 
If you control "Solomon's Diary" and "Solomon, Confessional Spirit": Solomon, the Dragon can attack your opponent's deck directly. 
If you do not control "Solomon's Diary" and "Solomon, Confessional Spirit": Solomon, the Dragon cannot attack directly and At the end of your turn: destroy a card you control

cards.name: Saladin
cards.text: Saladin can be played facedown in the Flank Zone.  Saladin has twice as much power when taking the Attack Action. (Facedown cards cannot be attacked or targeted by card effects. Flip the card face up when it takes an Action)
cards.flavourText: Since leaving his rulers in Jazeeria, Saladin bows to no one.
